question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks no didactic questions. It delivers solutions and explanations directly; the only questions in the conversation come from the student.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are posed by the Tutor, so no consequential forks are surfaced for the user to reason through.

scaffolding.rationale: Content is logically ordered (solution → ordering gotcha → alternative → idiom explanation), but it's pure exposition with the answer immediately revealed rather than scaffolded discovery.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and explanations are accurate and actionable, but it's lecture-style rather than back-and-forth pair programming. The student drove the only real dialogue.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
